rules.rule: NEVER load multiple step files simultaneously — one at a time only
ALWAYS read entire step/workflow file before taking any action
NEVER skip steps or optimize the sequence
ALWAYS update frontmatter state when writing output
ALWAYS halt at decision points and wait for user input
ALWAYS load config variables before starting any workflow
Use native file-reading tools for file content — avoid shell commands for reading files
For runtime code execution (file parsing, JSON building, temp file operations), use Node.js — do not assume Python is available

variable-resolution.action: Read the YAML file at config_source path, extract the named key value

step-file-protocol.execute: Follow ALL numbered sections in order
step-file-protocol.next: Load next step file only when explicitly directed
